description: update-projections.ts line 13 types publish as (event: { kind: string; [key: string]: unknown }) => void, accepting arbitrary objects. This is not type-safe against the PublicDomainEvent union. pipeline.ts line 162 casts ports.publish with 'as any' to bridge the type mismatch. TagInventoryUpdated is emitted as { kind: 'tag-inventory-updated' } without occurredOn, noteId, or other standard event fields that downstream consumers may expect. This loose typing could allow malformed events to enter the event bus.

evidence.snippet: readonly publish: (event: { kind: string; [key: string]: unknown }) => void;
